description: shadcn-ui accordion aria-disabled fix - ui + config
rationale: Call-graph analysis: accordion component .tsx file and JSON config files have no function call relationships. TSX components do not import or call into JSON config files. 3+ disconnected components (tsx + multiple json config files) = ERROR.
notes: Previously warning (ui+config = 2 domains). Call-graph analysis finds no import/call edges between .tsx components and .json configuration files, resulting in 3+ disconnected components.
